reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.reviewText: Absolutely love my nails! Jolany is so talented and professional. The studio has such a relaxing atmosphere. I've been coming here for months and always leave feeling amazing!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.reviewText: Best nail salon in Oceanside! My GelX nails lasted over 3 weeks without any lifting. The attention to detail is incredible. Will definitely be back!

reviews.name: Michelle R.
reviews.reviewText: The deep cleansing facial was amazing. My skin has never felt so refreshed and glowing. Jolany really knows what she's doing. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: Amanda K.
reviews.reviewText: I got a full set for a special event and received so many compliments! The designs were exactly what I wanted. Jolany is truly an artist.

reviews.name: Emily T.
reviews.reviewText: Such a wonderful experience! The studio is beautiful and clean, and Jolany makes you feel so comfortable. My pedicure was heavenly!
